prompt: Generate a bar chart of my workouts for the past year and save it as an image.

assertions.text: A PNG file was created (workout_chart.png exists in project root)
The script queried the workouts table from the correct DATABASE_URL in .env.local
A data summary was printed (total workouts, busiest month, or similar)
All 12 months are represented on the x-axis (no missing months)
